opportunities.ai_thesis: Strong positive sentiment across platforms (67% aggregated, 100% StockTwits bullish) indicates market optimism. An FDA catalyst 82 days out provides a structured near-term event. News coverage has been modestly favorable.

events.summary: Ligand Pharmaceuticals has a PDUFA decision date for FILSPARI (sNDA) for focal segmental glomerulosclerosis treatment.
Ligand Pharmaceuticals' sNDA for FILSPARI in focal segmental glomerulosclerosis (FSGS) has PDUFA date of January 13, 2026.
Eaton, an industrial equipment manufacturer, is showing strong technical setups as industrials sector outpaces tech in early 2026.

opportunities.ai_thesis: Upcoming FDA decision in 119 days provides a potential binary event catalyst; current 12% drawdown from highs offers an opportunistic entry for risk-tolerant catalyst traders.

events.summary: Travere Therapeutics has a PDUFA decision date for FILSPARI (sNDA) for focal segmental glomerulosclerosis treatment.
Travere Therapeutics has a PDUFA date for sNDA of FILSPARI for focal segmental glomerulosclerosis on January 13, 2026.
